title: Ai-Da
body: Ai-Da is an artificial intelligence robot that makes drawings, paintings, and sculptures. Completed in 2019, Ai-Da was described by The Guardian as "the world's first ultra-realistic humanoid robot artist". It is named after Ada Lovelace. The robot gained international attention when it was able to draw people with a pencil using her bionic hand and cameras in her eyes.
